title: Aspect Ratio
description: A component that maintains a specific aspect ratio for its content, useful for responsive layouts and consistent sizing.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-aspect-ratio to maintain a 16:9 aspect ratio for content.

sections.title: Different Ratios
sections.description: Examples showing different aspect ratios including square (1:1), widescreen (16:9), and portrait (4:3).

sections.title: Responsive Content
sections.description: Demonstrates how content adapts to different aspect ratios while maintaining proper proportions.

props.name: ratio
props.description: The aspect ratio to maintain. Default is 16/9 (approximately 1.78).

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void
